tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema + migration for suggestion fields
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add nullable suggestedText + appliedInVersionId (with FK relation) to the Prisma Annotation model and generate a migration.

**Files:** Modify prisma/schema.prisma (Annotation + DocumentVersion back-relation); Create prisma/migrations/<ts>_p5_suggestions/migration.sql.

**Acceptance Criteria:** suggestedText String? + appliedInVersionId String? exist; appliedInVersion relation ("AnnotationAppliedVersion", onDelete Restrict) + DocumentVersion.appliedSuggestions back-relation + @@index; prisma validate passes, client regenerated, tsc clean.

**Verify:** npx prisma validate && npx prisma migrate status

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "prisma/migrations"], "verifyCommand": "npx prisma validate && npx prisma migrate status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["suggestedText + appliedInVersionId fields exist", "appliedInVersion FK relation + back-relation + index", "prisma validate passes, tsc clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: applySuggestion() + createAnnotation suggestedText (lib, TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist suggestedText on create; add applySuggestion() that re-resolves the anchor, splices in suggested text, delegates to createVersion().

**Files:** Modify lib/annotations.ts; Test tests/unit/annotations.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** createAnnotation persists suggestedText only for SUGGESTION; applySuggestion replaces re-resolved span + createVersion + sets appliedInVersionId + RESOLVED; MOVED applies at relocated offsets, ORPHANED throws OrphanedAnchorError; stale baseVersionNumber → ConcurrencyError; non-suggestion/already-applied/no-text throw.

**Verify:** rtk vitest run tests/unit/annotations.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/annotations.ts", "tests/unit/annotations.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "rtk vitest run tests/unit/annotations.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createAnnotation persists suggestedText for SUGGESTION", "applySuggestion replaces span + createVersion + resolves", "MOVED re-resolves, ORPHANED throws", "stale → ConcurrencyError", "guards throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: API — apply route + create-annotation suggestedText
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Owner-only POST /api/annotations/[id]/apply + create route accepts suggestedText.

**Files:** Create app/api/annotations/[id]/apply/route.ts; Modify app/api/documents/[id]/annotations/route.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** apply → owner 200, non-owner 403, non-participant 404, orphaned 422, stale 409, bad body 400; create forwards kind+suggestedText (no new gates).

**Verify:** rtk tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/annotations/[id]/apply/route.ts", "app/api/documents/[id]/annotations/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "rtk tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["apply owner-only 403/404/409/422/400", "create forwards suggestedText", "tsc clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: P2 provenance — feedback shows "applied as vN" (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface accepted-suggestion provenance in the consolidated feedback contract.

**Files:** Modify lib/documents.ts (include appliedInVersion.versionNumber); Modify lib/feedback.ts; Test tests/unit/feedback.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** getDocumentDetail includes appliedInVersion.versionNumber; consolidateFeedback appends [applied as vN]; unapplied unaffected; FeedbackDetail exported + widened.

**Verify:** rtk vitest run tests/unit/feedback.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/documents.ts", "lib/feedback.ts", "tests/unit/feedback.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "rtk vitest run tests/unit/feedback.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getDocumentDetail includes appliedInVersion.versionNumber", "renders [applied as vN]", "unapplied unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Suggestion UI — reviewer proposes, owner accepts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reviewer suggest-edit mode + owner one-click Accept/Reject diff card (D9).

**Files:** Modify components/DocumentView.tsx, components/CommentSidebar.tsx, app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx.

**Acceptance Criteria:** ClientAnnotation gains kind/suggestedText/appliedInVersionNumber at all 4 mapping sites; suggest-edit posts SUGGESTION+suggestedText; diff card data-testid=suggestion; owner-only Accept/Reject, ORPHANED disabled, applied shows vN; isOwner threaded; existing hooks preserved.

**Verify:** rtk tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/DocumentView.tsx", "components/CommentSidebar.tsx", "app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "rtk tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ClientAnnotation new fields at all mapping sites", "suggest-edit posts SUGGESTION+suggestedText", "diff card data-testid=suggestion", "owner-only Accept/Reject, ORPHANED disabled, applied vN", "isOwner threaded, hooks preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: e2e — propose, accept, 403, provenance
tasks.description:
**Goal:** e2e coverage of reviewer→owner flow, non-owner guard, provenance.

**Files:** Create tests/e2e/suggestions.spec.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:** reviewer proposes, owner accepts → new version + RESOLVED + approval dismissed; non-owner apply → 403; owner detail shows appliedInVersion.versionNumber===2 and UI "Applied as v2".

**Verify:** CI=true rtk playwright test tests/e2e/suggestions.spec.ts; then full suite green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/suggestions.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true rtk playwright test tests/e2e/suggestions.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["propose→accept new version resolved approval-dismissed", "non-owner 403", "detail shows applied as v2"]}
```
